title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
